backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing survey backend with blob storage, access control, user profiles, OTP management, rate limiting, and survey submission/retrieval with comprehensive fields including age, experience, payment mode, employer, insurance type, and serving location details.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting that the 'draft.resumeTitle' translation key exists in both en.ts and hi.ts translation files with appropriate values for resuming surveys.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend files including components, hooks, translations, survey wizard steps, and admin features with details on draft auto-save, multilingual support, OTP verification, and updated survey fields.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark themes, defining colors for background, foreground, primary, secondary, muted, accent, destructive, borders, charts, and sidebar components.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React application with viewport meta tag and descriptive title about the mobile-first gig worker survey application.
frontend/src/admin/AdminDashboard.tsx: Admin dashboard displaying survey analytics including total submissions, verified/unverified counts, completion rate, category breakdown with translated labels, and navigation to OTP logs, SMS outbox, and CSV export functionality.
frontend/src/admin/AdminRouteGuard.tsx: Route guard component that checks Internet Identity authentication and admin status, displaying loading spinner during verification and AccessDeniedScreen for unauthorized users.
frontend/src/admin/ExportCsvButton.tsx: Button component that exports survey data to CSV format with translated category labels, including all survey fields (ID, category, phone, age, experience, payment mode, employer, insurance type, location details, OTP status, aadhaar hash, timestamp).
frontend/src/admin/OtpLogsView.tsx: Admin view component that displays OTP logs in a table with phone number filtering, showing timestamp, phone number, and success/failure status for each OTP attempt.
frontend/src/admin/SmsOutboxView.tsx: Admin view component that displays SMS outbox payloads in a sortable table with phone number filtering, showing message type, content, and timestamp for each SMS.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component configuring TanStack Router with routes for survey wizard, success page, admin dashboard, OTP logs, and SMS outbox, wrapped in ThemeProvider and LanguageProvider with shared layout including header, footer, and toaster.
frontend/src/components/AccessDeniedScre: Error screen component that displays an access denied message with a shield icon and a button to navigate back to the survey.
frontend/src/components/Auth/LoginButton: Authentication button component that handles Internet Identity login/logout, manages authentication state, and triggers the profile setup modal after login.
frontend/src/components/Auth/ProfileSetu: Modal dialog component that prompts authenticated users without a profile to enter their name, preventing dismissal until profile is saved.
frontend/src/components/LanguageSwitcher: Dropdown menu component that allows users to switch between English and Hindi languages using a globe icon trigger.
frontend/src/components/Layout/Footer.ts: Footer component displaying copyright information and a 'powered by Caffeine.ai' attribution with a heart icon.
frontend/src/components/Layout/Header.ts: Header component with logo, title, language switcher, login button, and conditional admin dashboard link for authorized users.
frontend/src/features/survey/components/: Reusable multi-select dropdown component with search, checkboxes, and removable badge display for selected options.
Phone number input with OTP generation and verification flow, including cooldown timer, rate limiting, and success/error messaging.
Visual progress bar showing current step number and completion percentage for the survey wizard.
frontend/src/features/survey/draft/useDr: Custom hook for managing survey draft persistence in localStorage with save, load, clear, and check operations.
frontend/src/features/survey/options.ts: Static configuration data for survey dropdowns including job categories, subcategories, languages, and Indian states with translation keys.
frontend/src/features/survey/ResumeDraft: Alert dialog component that prompts users to either resume a saved draft or start over with a new survey.
frontend/src/features/survey/signature/S: Canvas-based signature capture component supporting mouse and touch input with clear functionality and base64 image output.
frontend/src/features/survey/steps/Step1: Survey step 1 component that displays welcome message, consent checkbox, and a privacy policy dialog with detailed information about survey participation and optional priority token.
frontend/src/features/survey/steps/Step2: Survey step 2 alternative component that displays a notice explaining phone verification will be deferred, with benefits listed for completing the survey first.
Survey step 2 component that handles phone number input, OTP generation and verification with cooldown timer, using mutations for API calls and displaying success/error messages.
frontend/src/features/survey/steps/Step3: Survey step 3 component that collects basic user information including full name, gender, age, education level, and spoken languages using various input components.
frontend/src/features/survey/steps/Step4: Survey step 4 component that collects worker classification data including primary category, subcategory (with custom option), years of experience, and employment type using selects and radio groups.
frontend/src/features/survey/steps/Step5: Survey step 5 component that collects work and income details including working days/hours, payment mode, income range (daily or monthly based on work mode), and work-related challenges using multi-select.
frontend/src/features/survey/steps/Step6: Survey step component for collecting residential address (state, city, pincode, area, panchayat, block) and service area information, with conditional fields based on whether service area matches residential address.
frontend/src/features/survey/steps/Step7: Survey step component for optional identity verification, collecting Aadhaar number (formatted with spaces), alternative ID type selection, and ID image file upload.
frontend/src/features/survey/steps/Step8: Survey step component displaying consent text and providing a signature pad for users to digitally sign their agreement.
frontend/src/features/survey/steps/Step9: Survey step component collecting additional information about smartphone type, internet access frequency, willingness to use an app, expected benefits via multi-select, and future onboarding interest.
frontend/src/features/survey/SubmissionS: Success screen component displaying survey submission confirmation with survey ID, timestamp, print functionality, and option to start a new survey.
frontend/src/features/survey/SurveyRevie: Final survey step component that handles phone OTP verification, captcha validation, and submission of survey data to the backend with signature conversion to ExternalBlob.
frontend/src/features/survey/SurveyWizar: Main survey wizard component that manages multi-step form navigation (9 steps plus review), draft saving/resuming, and orchestrates all survey steps from consent to submission.
frontend/src/features/survey/types.ts: TypeScript type definitions for SurveyData interface covering all survey steps (consent, phone, demographics, work details, address, identity, signature, additional inputs) and initialSurveyData default values.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook managing backend actor creation with Internet Identity authentication, handling actor initialization with admin token, and invalidating dependent queries when actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login/logout flow, identity state, and AuthClient lifecycle with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: React Query hooks for backend API operations including OTP generation/verification, survey submission, fetching surveys/analytics/stats, OTP logs, SMS payloads, data export, and user profile management.
frontend/src/i18n/LanguageContext.tsx: React context provider for managing language state (en/hi) with localStorage persistence and a translation function that resolves nested keys from the translations object.
frontend/src/i18n/translations/en.ts: English translation strings for the entire application, including common UI elements, survey steps, privacy notices, admin panel, and worker profile sections.
frontend/src/i18n/translations/hi.ts: Hindi translation strings mirroring the English translations, providing full localization support for all application features and content.
frontend/src/i18n/translations/index.ts: Exports combined translations object with en and hi keys, and TypeScript types for Language and TranslationKeys.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light/dark themes using OKLCH color space, plus a fadeIn animation utility for step transitions.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query and Internet Identity providers, then renders the App component into the root DOM element.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence and cleanup helpers.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration with custom color system using OKLCH variables, container settings, extended animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state tracking a multilingual survey website for gig workers in India with OTP verification, step-by-step forms, admin analytics, and privacy compliance. Currently has critical issues: OTP/SMS delivery not working, and i18n translation keys displaying as raw text instead of translated values.
